batch_metadata.note: Phase A/B transition. May 2025 hot period begins in this batch. Data structure note: ROW-7798-9568 spans a sequential primary block with sparse coverage through Apr 10 then denser May coverage. Batch contains the ROW-9536 continuation-after-self-demand signal and 'She better check herself' Abby threat.

flagged_messages.message_text: ROW-9536 (Received): 'If you don't have anything constructive or a solution stop texting me. Otherwise it's harassment and I will file harassment' | ROW-9540 (Received): 'She feels left out by you anyways so these instances don't help that feeling' | [continued messaging through ROW-9568]
flagged_messages.primary_reasoning: Continuation-after-self-demand — the clearest example of this pattern in the dataset. ROW-9536: Melissa issues her own stop command ('stop texting me...otherwise it's harassment') as a legal threat to shut down co-parenting communication. Immediately after issuing this stop command, Melissa continues messaging on the same topic (ROW-9540: 'She feels left out by you anyways...'). The mechanism: Melissa deploys 'stop texting me' as intimidation and legal-threat weaponization, not as a genuine communication boundary. She continues the conversation herself, establishing that the 'stop' was a control mechanism rather than a genuine request. Per ADD-003: Melissa's continuation into Eli's silence constitutes RF-07. The inverse is also confirmed here — Melissa's own 'stop texting me' followed by her own continuation demonstrates the selective/weaponized nature of her stop commands. Sev-2: explicit verbal stop command issued (Sev-2 tier per ADD-003) combined with immediate self-continuation. Additional content: 'She better check herself' (Abby threat) — RF-04+RF-05 compound component. May 2025 is a confirmed RF-07 hot period (INF-007: Eli holding communication boundaries triggers escalation). ARC-RF07-001-S003.
verbatim_key_messages: ROW-9536 (Received): 'If you don't have anything constructive or a solution stop texting me. Otherwise it's harassment and I will file harassment'
ROW-9540 (Received): 'She feels left out by you anyways so these instances don't help that feeling'

flagged_messages.calibration_notes: Sev-2 confirmed: explicit verbal stop command issued by Melissa followed by her own continuation. This is the clearest continuation-after-self-demand signal in the dataset — ADD-003 mechanism most purely illustrated here. The weaponized 'stop texting me / harassment' framing also generates RF-05 compound component (legal threat deployed to suppress communication).

arc_state_snapshot.note: ARC-RF07-001 ACTIVE. S-003 added (ROW-9536, Sev-2). Arc now at 3 signals: S-001 (Aug 2024 mega-cluster, Sev-2), S-002 (Dec 2024 response-demand, Sev-1), S-003 (May 2025 continuation-after-self-demand, Sev-2). Sub-pattern: continuation_after_self_demand confirmed. COMP-RF07-002 generated (RF-07+RF-04+RF-05). May 2025 hot period confirmed active in this batch.

compound_patterns.summary: RF-04+RF-05+RF-07 triple compound. RF-07 (Sev-2: continuation-after-self-demand; 'stop texting me' weaponized as harassment threat then immediately continued; ARC-RF07-001-S003) + RF-05 ('harassment' legal threat to suppress co-parenting communication; 'will file harassment'; ARC-RF05-001) + RF-04 ('She feels left out by you anyways' child-as-guilt-lever; 'She better check herself' Abby threat; ARC-RF04-001). Triggered by Eli attempting co-parenting communication; Melissa responds with simultaneous stop-command, legal threat, inadequate-father framing, and Abby threat — then continues messaging herself.

batch_observations.tone_assessment: Escalating — Mar-May 2025 ramp into the May 2025 hot period. INF-007 (Eli holding communication boundaries) drives Melissa's escalation pattern. May 2025 spike confirmed here with S-003.
batch_observations.rf07_assessment: B-024 contains the dataset's clearest continuation-after-self-demand signal: Melissa issues a stop command as a legal threat, then continues the conversation herself. This is the ADD-003 mechanism in its purest form. May 2025 hot period (the highest-signal period in the triage profile) is anchored here and in B-025. The weaponized stop command establishes Melissa's pattern of using communication boundaries as control mechanisms rather than genuine requests.
batch_observations.custodial_context: May 2025 messaging pattern includes Eli's parenting-time weekends. ROW-9536 episode occurs in the context of Eli attempting co-parenting communication — Melissa's 'stop texting me' response to routine co-parenting contact is the core RF-07 mechanism here.
